title: lathyrus pannonicus subsp. longestipulatus
intro: Lathyrus pannonicus subsp. longestipulatus, also known as a subspecies of the Pannonian pea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus pannonicus subsp. longestipulatus include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties and is often used in folk medicine for its therapeutic benefits.
